musicianID: Wikidata entity identifier for the musician.
musicianName: Name of the musician, possibly including IPI numbers.
genderType: Gender of the musician (m for male).
birthDate: Date of birth of the musician.
city: City where the musician was born.
NChildren: Number of children the performer has.
kind: Type of performance or genre associated with the performer.
webpage: Official website URL of the performer.
